---
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7"></script>
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script src="js/globe-bg.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <canvas id="globe-bg"></canvas>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p>Hi, I am <strong>Joseph Martinez</strong> — a financial professional and graduate student utilizing data science to maximize understandings of markets both domestic and global.</p>
  </div>
</section>
```
